Audio Program

Audio Classes ORDS Music School

Learn recording, mixing, production workflow, and creative audio fundamentals.

Audio Program

What you'll learn.

Personalized lessons that help students grow musically and confidently.

Recording Basics

Hands-on coaching that builds skill, confidence, discipline, and real musical application.

Mixing Workflow

Hands-on coaching that builds skill, confidence, discipline, and real musical application.

Creative Production

Hands-on coaching that builds skill, confidence, discipline, and real musical application.

Who Can Join?

Audio Classes for every skill level.

Whether you're just starting or ready to refine your skill, ORDS helps students grow with personalized instruction and musical discipline.

01
Beginners

Learn the language of recording, signal flow, session setup, and clean audio basics.

02
Musicians

Understand how to capture ideas, arrange parts, and communicate better in the studio.

03
Future Producers

Build workflow, mixing decisions, creative direction, and release-minded production habits.

Book Free Consultation
The ORDS Team

Learn from experienced mentors.

Students receive guidance from people who care about skill, discipline, confidence, and musical growth.

Mixing / Audio Coach

Oscar Ramos

Oscar is a dedicated drummer and educator focused on building disciplined musicians with strong foundations, confidence, and excellence in worship and performance.

@tito_ovr
Mastering / Audio Coach

Jorge Saenz

Jorge specializes in contemporary guitar, tone, technique, and musical expression, with coaching for pedalboards and confident live playing.

@jasaenz
The ORDS Experience

More than lessons.

A place to build discipline, confidence, creativity, and musical excellence.
